tags.name: EV Charger
tags.note: This demonstrative DCFC unit was installed by ABB for all users of hybrid and BEV vehicles to use. No fee imposed. The charger was online since February 2017.

tags.description: ABB Terra CJG AC and DC fast charger, a multi-standards unit rated for charging at 43 kW AC and 50 kW DC.
tags.name: JomCharge
tags.note: 1st public EV rapid charger in Malaysia. Operational around October 2020. Could not charge by kWhr yet.

tags.description: ABB Terra CJG AC and DC fast charger, a multi-standards unit rated for charging at 43 kW AC and 50 kW DC.
tags.name: JomCharge
tags.note: 2nd public EV rapid charger in Malaysia. Operational around December 2020. Could not charge fee by kWhr yet.
